mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agents ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agents (name, instructions, description, keywords, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{instructions}, #{description}, #{keywords}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE agents SET name = #{name}, instructions = #{instructions}, description = #{description}, keywords = #{keywords}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agents SET status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE agents SET status=0 WHERE id = #{id}
